$comment: Selector registry for Tend. Flows reference @keys, never raw copy. text = Maestro regex (matches visible text OR a11y label, full-match). Anchors target the seeded people (src/qa/fixtures.ts). Wrap a card anchor in .* because rows can merge title+subtitle into one a11y label on iOS.

home-title.note: TodayScreen header title (i18n today.title) — the default tab

seeded-person.note: the seeded overdue person, shown under 'Reach out' on Today

reached-out-btn.note: primary button on PersonDetail (i18n person.reachedOut) — logs contact

reached-out-confirm.note: status after logging contact (i18n person.lastReachedToday); absent before the tap, present after

people-tab.note: the People bottom-tab (i18n nav.people). The T4 survival flow re-reaches the seeded person AFTER logging contact through here: once contacted, they drop off Today's 'Reach out' list, so post-relaunch navigation goes via the full People directory, not Today.

cadence-row.note: the cadence DrilldownRow a11y label on the seeded person (Mom, weekly) — `label: value`

cadence-sheet-title.text: How often do you want to reach out?
cadence-sheet-title.note: CadenceSheet header title (i18n person.cadenceLabel) — proves the spoke sheet opens

cadence-monthly.note: the Monthly option in the cadence sheet (i18n person.cadenceMonthly); single-select, returns immediately

cadence-row-monthly.note: the hub row after the pick — the Tier-2 outcome proof the spoke wrote through
